title: Biogeochemical processes in Baltic Sea sediments as a recorder of environmental change over the Holocene
author: Piso, Lina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset comprises phosphorus (P) extraction data and reprocessed metagenomic sequencing data collected from sediment samples at multiple sites in the Baltic Sea. The P extraction data is derived from samples collected at Little Belt (M0059). The metagenomic sequencing data originates from sediment samples collected at three sites: Little Belt (M0059), Bornholm Basin (M0065), and Landsort Deep (M0063).
steps_raw: This dataset comprises phosphorus (P) extraction data and reprocessed metagenomic sequencing data collected from sediment samples at multiple sites in the Baltic Sea.
